title: ISC Telemetry UI Redesign
subtitle: Illini Solar Car — Passed on September 2023
subheader: As part of the Illini Solar Car's strategy team, I am working on a user interface redesign of the team's telemetry app, with the goal to make a more readable UI from the ground up.

images.caption: Images of the rehauled design, using a monospace font, as well as a cleaner graph setup.
Images of the rehauled design, using a monospace font, as well as a cleaner graph setup.
Images of the rehauled design, using a monospace font, as well as a cleaner graph setup.

content.value: For this project, I worked with and learned the React.JS frontend, while interviewing former and current ISC higherups. I hope to finish this project by the time the team prepares for the next race, most likely for ASC 2024. A majority of the coding and development has been passed on to other strategy team members, but I still am heading the project, and plan on reiterating designs based on user unit tests.
